samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="WIDTH" value="8">Width of each data entry.</parameter>
        <parameter id="DEPTH" value="16">Depth of the FIFO.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Dual-port RAM instance
        <instance id="ram" module_id="dual_port_RAM">
            <connection id="wclk" port_id="wclk"/>
            <connection id="wenc" port_id="wen"/>
            <connection id="waddr" port_id="waddr"/>
            <connection id="wdata" port_id="wdata"/>
            <connection id="rclk" port_id="rclk"/>
            <connection id="renc" port_id="ren"/>
            <connection id="raddr" port_id="raddr"/>
            <connection id="rdata" port_id="rdata"/>
        </instance>
        
        // Write Pointer Logic
        <reg id="waddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Binary representation of write address.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            if (winc && wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end else if (!wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= 0;
            end
        </always_comb>
        <wire id="wptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Gray code representation of write pointer.</wire>
        <assign wptr[0] = waddr_bin[0];
        <assign wptr[1] = waddr_bin[1] ^ waddr_bin[0];
        <assign wptr[2] = waddr_bin[2] ^ waddr_bin[1];
        <assign wptr[3] = waddr_bin[3] ^ waddr_bin[2];
        <assign wptr[4] = waddr_bin[4] ^ waddr_bin[3];
        <assign wptr[5] = waddr_bin[5] ^ waddr_bin[4];
        <assign wptr[6] = waddr_bin[6] ^ waddr_bin[5];
        <assign wptr[7] = waddr_bin[7] ^ waddr_bin[6];
        <reg id="wptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Buffer for write pointer.</reg>
        <always_ff posedge wclk or negedge wrstn>
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        </always_ff>
        
        // Read Pointer Logic
        <reg id="raddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Binary representation of read address.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            if (rinc && rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end else if (!rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= 0;
            end
        </always_comb>
        <wire id="rptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Gray code representation of read pointer.</wire>
        <assign rptr[0] = raddr_bin[0];
        <assign rptr[1] = raddr_bin[1] ^ raddr_bin[0];
        <assign rptr[2] = raddr_bin[2] ^ raddr_bin[1];
        <assign rptr[3] = raddr_bin[3] ^ raddr_bin[2];
        <assign rptr[4] = raddr_bin[4] ^ raddr_bin[3];
        <assign rptr[5] = raddr_bin[5] ^ raddr_bin[4];
        <assign rptr[6] = raddr_bin[6] ^ raddr_bin[5];
        <assign rptr[7] = raddr_bin[7] ^ raddr_bin[6];
        <reg id="rptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Buffer for read pointer.</reg>
        <always_ff posedge rclk or negedge rrstn>
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        </always_ff>
        
        // Full/Empty Signal Logic
        <wire id="wfull">Write full signal.</wire>
        <assign wfull = (wptr == {~rptr_buff[$clog2(DEPTH)], rptr_buff[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]});
        <wire id="rempty">Read empty signal.</wire>
        <assign rempty = (rptr == wptr);
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Implements an asynchronous FIFO with dual-port RAM and pointer management.</implementation>
</module>
